name: system
description: /system — campaign control-tower (domain-agnostic) with a code-level decision harness (0.7.0) + all-paths autonomy (0.8.0). One persistent mission-control over EVERY in-flight job of a long-running campaign across ANY execution surface (rented pods via cloud · pool hosts · local procs). Ties the manifest (cwd ./pods.json) + event-driven watchers + harvest+verdict + the autonomous harvest→re-dispatch loop into one command. NOT domain-locked — DFT sweeps · ML training fleets · build matrices · render farms · any N-parallel-job campaign with a queued backlog. Verbs: bare/status · tick [--apply] (0.7.0 deterministic probe→classify→decide harness via bin/system_harness.hexa) · watch · harvest [<id>] · next/redispatch · auto · drive · pursue (NEW 0.8.0 — ALL-PATHS autonomy: enumerate EVERY open campaign thread (stalled-resumable jobs · tooling gaps · queued waves · cost-leaks · un-harvested terminals) + fan ALL out in parallel, NO human 'which next?' menu; only genuine human-input gates wait) · stop · cost · queue [add|rm|ls] · upstream. 0.7.0 replaced the per-JOB 'pick 1/2/3/4' with a decision table; 0.8.0 extends it to the per-CAMPAIGN next-move menu — human role shrinks to genuine gates, not routing. Triggers: /system · 관제탑 · 캠페인 현황 · mission control · campaign status · 후보 자율 · 모든 경로 진행 · pursue · 결과보고 추가발사 · 자율 재발사 루프 · control tower.
